evidence_policy.rule: A conversation, task-complete marker, merge, or deployment is not a live runtime receipt. Each plane is evaluated independently.

selected_replit_app.name: Unified Control Hub
selected_replit_app.claim_boundary: The Replit task UI previously recorded task 26 as complete, but the fresh authorized connector recheck returned a paused phase and no source export, repository identity, commit, preview receipt, test receipt, or live runtime response. The proposed operational control-plane rebuild therefore remains unverified.
selected_replit_app.ownership_rule: This app may host a future authenticated control plane on a distinct origin. It must not overwrite or impersonate the public a11oy.net GitHub Pages site.

planes.purpose: Public governed-inference product and API surface
Public presentation site; not the Replit API or authenticated control plane
planes.mutation_rule: Only the a11oy-net repository and its reviewed Pages workflow may mutate this plane. Replit work must use a separate origin until an explicitly reviewed migration changes ownership.

planes.promotion_gate: Record repository, branch, immutable commit, preview/deployment URL, test receipt, and independent live probes before this plane may be labeled operational.

anatomy_v6.source_commit_subject: v6 ratchet: alive-proof layer — DSSE-verified harness runs on the map (#40)

alive_harness.claim_boundary: The independent DSSE verification proves the published harness record was signed by the pinned key and reports GREEN. It does not establish deployment-source alignment, correctness of every organ, or a new theorem.

anatomy_v6.claim_boundary: The v6 source, CI, and live routes are real. The live source attestation still reports PENDING_GITHUB_SYNC, so the deployed bytes must not be described as commit-aligned or provenance-closed.
